# Paimon Tools — Full Content
> 100% client-side data conversion tools. Your data never leaves the browser.

Paimon Tools is a free, open-source collection of in-browser utilities for converting, formatting, and manipulating data. Everything runs locally — no uploads, no servers, no sign-up. This file contains the full content of every tool page for AI consumption.

---

## Home — Paimon Tools

Paimon Tools is a free, private, in-browser data converter and toolkit. Convert between JSON, CSV, and Excel entirely in your browser — no uploads, no sign-up, no servers. Your data never leaves your device.

### Available Tools
- JSON to CSV — convert JSON arrays to CSV tables
- CSV to JSON — convert CSV tables to JSON arrays
- JSON to Excel (.xlsx) — export JSON as spreadsheets
- Excel to JSON — extract JSON from .xlsx files
- CSV to Excel — turn CSV into .xlsx
- Excel to CSV — extract CSV from .xlsx sheets
- JSON Formatter — pretty-print and validate JSON
- JSON Minifier — compress JSON by stripping whitespace
- Code Playground — run JavaScript, Python & HTML online
- Base64 Encode — encode text to Base64
- Base64 Decode — decode Base64 back to text
- YAML to JSON — convert YAML to JSON
- JSON to YAML — convert JSON to YAML
- SHA-256 Hash — generate SHA-256 checksum
- Combine Files — merge multiple CSV & Excel files into one
- Diff Tool — compare two texts side by side

---

## JSON to CSV Converter

Convert a JSON array to a CSV table entirely in your browser. Paste your JSON data and get clean CSV output — no uploads, no sign-up, fully private.

### Example
Input JSON: `[{"name":"Alice","age":30},{"name":"Bob","age":25}]`

Output CSV:
```
name,age
Alice,30
Bob,25
```

### How It Works
1. Paste or type a JSON array into the input pane
2. The CSV output updates in real-time as you type
3. Copy the result or download as a .csv file

### FAQ
- **What JSON formats are supported?** Standard JSON arrays of objects. Keys become column headers, values become rows. Nested objects are stringified.
- **Is my data uploaded anywhere?** No. Everything runs locally in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.

---

## CSV to JSON Converter

Convert a CSV table to a JSON array entirely in your browser. Paste CSV data with headers and get clean JSON — no uploads, no sign-up, fully private.

### Example
Input CSV:
```csv
name,age
Alice,30
Bob,25
```

Output JSON:
```json
[{"name":"Alice","age":30},{"name":"Bob","age":25}]
```

### How It Works
1. Paste or type CSV data with headers into the input pane
2. JSON output updates in real-time
3. Copy the result or download as a .json file

### FAQ
- **Does it support escaped commas/quotes?** Yes. Standard CSV escaping (quoted fields, escaped quotes) is fully supported.
- **What about empty cells?** Empty cells become null values in the JSON output.

---

## JSON to Excel Converter

Export a JSON array as a downloadable Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx) entirely in your browser. Your data is processed locally — no uploads, no sign-up.

### How It Works
1. Paste or type a JSON array into the input pane
2. The preview updates in real-time
3. Click download to get a .xlsx file with the data in sheet "Data"

---

## Excel to JSON Converter

Extract JSON data from an Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheet entirely in your browser. Drop a file and get a JSON array from the first sheet — no uploads, no sign-up.

---

## CSV to Excel Converter and Excel to CSV Converter

Bidirectional conversion between CSV and Excel (.xlsx) formats. Process locally — just paste CSV or drop an Excel file and get the result instantly.

---

## JSON Formatter & Beautifier

Format, beautify, and validate JSON entirely in your browser. Pretty-print with 2 spaces, 4 spaces, or tabs — validates syntax on the fly, highlighting errors as you type. Your data never leaves your device.

### FAQ
- **Does it validate as I type?** Yes. JSON is auto-validated on every keystroke with inline error messages.
- **What indentation options are available?** 2 spaces, 4 spaces, or tabs.

---

## JSON Minifier

Minify and compress JSON entirely in your browser. Strips all unnecessary whitespace to reduce file size — validates syntax as it goes. No uploads, fully private.

---

## Base64 Encode

Encode any text to Base64 entirely in your browser. UTF-8 safe — handles Unicode, emoji, and special characters. No uploads, no sign-up.

### Example
Input: `Hello, World!` → Output: `SGVsbG8sIFdvcmxkIQ==`

---

## Base64 Decode

Decode Base64 strings back to readable text entirely in your browser. Supports standard Base64 encoded strings.

### Example
Input: `SGVsbG8sIFdvcmxkIQ==` → Output: `Hello, World!`

---

## UUID Generator

Generate random UUID v4 identifiers entirely in your browser. Click to generate — no uploads, no sign-up.

### FAQ
- **What UUID version is generated?** UUID v4 (random). Cryptographically secure random values from the Web Crypto API.
- **Can I generate multiple at once?** Yes, use the "Generate multiple" option to create a batch.

---

## YAML to JSON Converter

Convert YAML to JSON entirely in your browser. Paste YAML and get clean, formatted JSON — no uploads, no sign-up.

---

## JSON to YAML Converter

Convert JSON to YAML entirely in your browser. Paste JSON and get clean, readable YAML output — no uploads, no sign-up.

---

## SHA-256 Hash Generator

Generate SHA-256 hash of any text entirely in your browser. Pure JavaScript implementation using the Web Crypto API — your data never leaves your device.

### FAQ
- **Is this cryptographically secure?** Yes. Uses the Web Crypto API's built-in SHA-256 implementation — the same one browsers use for HTTPS.
- **Can I hash files?** Yes. Drop a file and its SHA-256 hash is computed locally.

---

## Combine CSV & Excel Files

Merge multiple CSV, TSV and Excel files into one file entirely in your browser. Append rows from 2+ files, auto-detect format, union columns — supports mixed formats.

### How It Works
1. Add two or more CSV or Excel files
2. The tool auto-detects format and unions columns
3. Download the combined result as CSV or Excel

---

## Diff Tool

Compare two texts or files entirely in your browser. Side-by-side or unified diff view with color-coded added/removed lines. Paste text or drop files — no uploads, no sign-up, unlimited size.

### How It Works
1. Paste text A in the left pane and text B in the right pane
2. Differences are highlighted in real-time with color-coded lines
3. Added lines are green, removed lines are red, modified lines are yellow

---

## Text Delimiter Tool

Join list items with custom delimiter, quotes, and wrapping — entirely in your browser.

### Common Use Cases
- Generate SQL `IN ('a', 'b', 'c')` from a list
- Create HTML lists with `<li>` tags
- Build JavaScript array literals `["a", "b", "c"]`
- Convert column data to pipe-separated values

### How It Works
1. Paste your items (one per line)
2. Choose a delimiter, quoting, and optional wrapping
3. Output updates instantly — all processing is local

---

## Online Code Playground

Write and run code in your browser. Choose from JavaScript (sandboxed execution), Python (via Pyodide WASM), HTML (live iframe preview), or JSON (format & validate). Everything runs locally.

### Languages
- [JavaScript Playground](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/javascript/) — sandboxed JS execution
- [TypeScript Playground](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/typescript/) — transpile & run via esbuild-wasm
- [Python Playground](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/python/) — Pyodide WASM Python
- [HTML Playground](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/html/) — live iframe preview
- [JSON Playground](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/code/json/) — format & validate

---

## JavaScript Online Playground

Write and run JavaScript code in your browser. Sandboxed execution (Web Worker) with full console output.

### Features
- Sandboxed execution via Web Worker — runs in isolation with no DOM access
- Async callback capture — setTimeout, setInterval, fetch.then tracked automatically
- CodeMirror 6 with oneDark theme, bracket matching, and line numbers
- Share code via compressed URL hash — no server needed

### Example
```javascript
async function getData() {
  const res = await fetch('https://api.example.com/data');
  const json = await res.json();
  console.log(json);
}
getData();
```

### FAQ
- **Does it support setTimeout and fetch?** Yes. Async callbacks are tracked automatically via API instrumentation. The playground waits for all pending operations before finalizing.
- **Can I use ES modules?** In Plain JavaScript, use dynamic import(). For full npm import support, use the TypeScript playground.

---

## TypeScript Online Playground

Write and run TypeScript code in your browser. Powered by esbuild-wasm for fast transpilation with npm import support.

### Features
- TypeScript transpilation via esbuild-wasm — runs in your browser, no server
- npm import support via esm.sh CDN — use any npm package
- Sandboxed execution (Web Worker) with full console capture
- CodeMirror 6 with TypeScript syntax highlighting

### Example
```typescript
import lodash from 'lodash';
const arr = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
console.log(lodash.chunk(arr, 2));
```

### FAQ
- **Does it support npm imports?** Yes. Bare imports are bundled via esbuild-wasm with packages resolved from esm.sh CDN.
- **Is compilation server-side?** No. esbuild-wasm runs entirely in your browser as a WebAssembly binary.

---

## Python Online Playground

Write and run Python code in your browser, powered by Pyodide WASM.

### Features
- Full CPython runtime via Pyodide WASM (~12 MB, cached after first load)
- Standard library: math, json, random, statistics, collections
- Print output captured and displayed in real time
- CodeMirror 6 with Python syntax highlighting

### Example
```python
squares = [x**2 for x in range(10)]
print(f"Squares: {squares}")
```

### FAQ
- **Does it include numpy or pandas?** Pyodide includes many scientific libraries, but numpy and pandas are not bundled by default. Standard library modules are fully supported.
- **Why is the first run slow?** The first run downloads the Pyodide WASM binary (~12 MB). After that it is cached and subsequent runs are instant.

---

## HTML Online Playground

Write HTML, CSS and JavaScript with a live iframe preview — updates in real time.

### Features
- Live iframe preview with srcdoc — edit and see changes instantly
- Sandboxed — your page runs in isolation from the parent
- Supports full HTML documents including `<style>` and `<script>` tags
- CodeMirror 6 with HTML syntax highlighting

### FAQ
- **Is the HTML preview sandboxed?** Yes. The preview runs in a sandboxed iframe using srcdoc. It has no access to the parent page, cookies, or localStorage.

---

## JSON Online Playground

Format, validate and edit JSON in your browser with syntax highlighting and auto-validation.

### Features
- Real-time JSON validation with inline error highlighting
- Auto-formatting with configurable indentation
- CodeMirror 6 with JSON syntax highlighting and bracket matching

### FAQ
- **Does it validate as I type?** Yes. JSON is auto-validated on every keystroke with inline error messages.

---

## Technical Details

- **Repository**: https://github.com/paimonchan/paimon-tools
- **License**: MIT
- **Stack**: React 19, TypeScript 7, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS v4
- **Data Libraries**: SheetJS (xlsx), PapaParse (CSV), js-yaml (YAML), json5 (JSON5)
- **Code Editor**: CodeMirror 6 (JSON, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, CSS, HTML, Markdown, SQL, XML, YAML)
- **Python Runtime**: Pyodide WASM
- **Playground Bundler**: esbuild-wasm
